positive: Minimalist, abstract representation of a celestial ocean. A large, stylized crescent moon cradling a nebula-filled sea. The moon should have a smooth, matte texture, contrasting with the fluid, glowing teal and deep indigo tones of the nebula. Incorporate faint, geometric wave patterns that suggest cosmic tides. Composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for full-chest placement on apparel. Use high contrast black outlines against the luminous background. Style: Flat vector illustration combined with bioluminescent watercolor washes. Ideal for silkscreen printing, clean lines, graphic pop art aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, grain, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, noisy, solid color background, realistic photo, 3d render
